description: Magazine Layouts v5 Extension - 40 new templates (Editorial 20 + Cute 20) + background system. Use merged with magazine_layouts_v5.json. New templates use borrows_sets_from to reference existing dedicated_sets.

templates.name: Side Caption Minimal
templates.description: Large photo left + small caption card right. Most minimal gallery style.

templates.name: Vertical Strip Sidetext
templates.description: Vertical strip photo left + side caption + large label overlapping photo.

templates.name: Top Wide Bottom Card
templates.description: Top wide photo + bottom text card (left body + right meta).

templates.name: Big Number Hero
templates.description: Large serif number + left photo + right text.

templates.name: Magazine Cover Pure
templates.description: Full bleed photo + masthead top left + captions bottom.

templates.name: Big Number Duo
templates.description: Large serif number + left photo + right small photo + meta.

templates.name: Top Hero Bottom Duo
templates.description: Top wide photo + bottom duo photo + side text.

templates.name: Side by Side Spread
templates.description: Equal left/right split — left photo+caption, right photo+body.

templates.name: Mono Spread Editorial
templates.description: B&W magazine duo — large left photo + small right photo + body.

templates.name: Triangle Split Duo
templates.description: Two photos split diagonally + center text card.

templates.name: Big Plus Two Mosaic
templates.description: Large photo 1 + right small photos 2 mosaic + side caption.

templates.name: Three Up Wide Caption
templates.description: Horizontal 3-up grid + bottom wide body.

templates.name: Hero Plus Two Side
templates.description: Large left photo + right vertical duo + right text column.

templates.name: Vertical Strip Trio City
templates.description: Three vertical strip photos + side body + city label overlapping.

templates.name: Editorial Magazine Spread Trio
templates.description: Magazine spread — left page big photo+caption / right page small duo+body column.

templates.name: Irregular Mosaic Big Three
templates.description: 1 large + 3 small irregular mosaic + right text card.

templates.name: Quad Big Caption
templates.description: 4-up equal grid + left big caption (3 landscape + 1 wide side).

templates.name: Travel Album Quad Wide
templates.description: 4-up wide layout (landscape magazine) + city label bottom right.

templates.name: Magazine Spread Quad
templates.description: Magazine spread — left full body + right 4-up grid.

templates.name: Horizontal Strip Quad
templates.description: Horizontal 4-up strips (equal) + top large title.

templates.name: Big Name Pet Card
templates.description: Large serif name top + photo + left 4 icon metadata.

templates.name: Goodest Boy Portrait
templates.description: Top small badge + large serif name + photo + bottom 4 icon horizontal meta.

templates.name: Definition Card
templates.description: Large script name + photo + star rating + soft definition caption.

templates.name: Polaroid Single Soft
templates.description: Tilted polaroid photo 1 + short handwritten caption.

templates.name: Magazine Cover Cute
templates.description: Cute magazine cover — large masthead + side captions + full photo.

templates.name: Polaroid Duo Soft
templates.description: Tilted polaroid 2 + soft background + top short caption.

templates.name: Pet Care Frame Duo
templates.description: Two square frame cards side by side + each label.

templates.name: Got a Pet Polaroid Pair
templates.description: Two polaroids + warm background + top large caption + bottom body.

templates.name: Profile Cards Horizontal
templates.description: Horizontal name card duo (each card: photo+name+meta). cute vertical.

templates.name: Side by Side Posters
templates.description: Two full bleed poster split + unified headline top.

templates.name: Adopt Trio
templates.description: Horizontal trio photos + large headline + meta box.

templates.description: Scattered tilted polaroid 3 + soft background + top short caption.

templates.description: Grid mosaic 3-up + family label + color accent box.

templates.name: Same Theme Trio
templates.description: Same headline (top left) + 3 full bleed vertical cards.

templates.description: 2x2 canvas gallery — 4 equal grid + aged frame effect.
